name: dojo-forge
description: Meta-plugin that generates tutored coding-dojo plugins for workshops on any topic. Run /dojo-forge:new, answer an interview (topic, spine progression, jail/constraint, win-condition), and it scaffolds a complete, loadable dojo plugin — same shape as c10k-dojo — with a Socratic tutor, hooks-as-jail, per-project state, and a topic-tailored curriculum.
